steps.title: Read the visual context
steps.content: The poem describes a reflection blending so perfectly with the river scene that even the keenest vision cannot make out the border line. The word must describe what sight is unable to do.

steps.title: Choose the perception meaning
steps.content: Choice A and Choice B involve putting something into words, not seeing it. Choice D means lessen or reduce, which does not fit a border line. Detect means perceive or identify, matching the idea that the line cannot be seen. The answer is C.
